chunks.title: David Organizes the Army
chunks.reason: Describes David's preparation and command to his commanders.

chunks.title: Battle in Ephraim Forest
chunks.reason: Narrates the battle, Absalom's death, and his burial.

chunks.title: Messengers Sent to David
chunks.reason: Dialogue between Ahimaaz, Joab, and the Cushite regarding who will report.

chunks.title: Ahimaaz Arrives First
chunks.reason: Narrates the watchman spotting runners and Ahimaaz's report.

chunks.title: Cushite Arrives and David Weeps
chunks.reason: Narrates the Cushite's report and David's grief.
